notes: LINT.PLACEHOLDER is the placeholder-fabrication code (an unresolved {TOKEN} can never publish): SOFT/warn, but it carries bars_recommended, so the pre-gate verdict is PASS_ALTERNATE_ONLY (§14.2) — the variant ships A/B-only until the token is filled. Distinct from the LLM fact-firewall FM.FABRICATION (see claims-safety/).
